race.description: Tabtouch Punters Club Now On Sale Hcp (C3)
race.comment: GOD'S GRIN (8) finished off strongly first-up over 1200m and looks better suited now over further. Brad Parnham sticks with her and the rating she put up fresh is very strong for this with improvement on the cards. She looks the one to beat in this with plenty in her favour. ROMANTIC RULER (1) tackled a much stronger race first-up after trialling well coming into this campaign. Back to the midweeks is a good move and she usually improves with racing. Can bounce back in a big way. ANCIENT GUIDANCE (2) wasn't far away last time out and can be in the finish again today. MASTERLY (7) is better than he's shown his past couple and finds a suitable race today.
